testcase.name: test_restricted_product_hidden_from_blocked_customer
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter91_visibility_email_fixes.py:58: in test_customer assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create test customer: {resp.status_code} {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create test customer: 405 {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 in [200, 201] E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
